name: Hassad
description:
Open Scenario

“Hassad (ハサド, Hasado), also known as The Arabian Whirlwind (アラブの旋風せんぷう, Arabu no Senpū), was the affiliated fighter for Persia Petroleum and one of the five candidates who successfully passed the Kengan Annihilation Tournament preliminaries. He is also the first in line to the throne of a small nation in the Middle East.”
creator: Red348
